title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O challenges the Sprinters
Stakes for a second time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She asks Nishino Flower to visit her waiting room,
where she declares that this will be her victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are confident in their speed. In a
match that almost feels like destiny, the two
Umamusume get ready to fight fair and square!
